song.title: Not Broken Anymore
song.keywords: healing, love, wholeness, The Unseen Chorus
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Not Broken Anymore' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

twitter.title: Not Broken Anymore Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
twitter.description: Full lyrics to 'Not Broken Anymore' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia. Healing.

essay: Not Broken Anymore reframes identity beyond addiction and shame. It is a declaration of earned wholeness, grounded in process, community, and repaired self-trust.
song.lyricsHtml:
I thought I'd never stand again
A man alone a heart condemned
But piece by piece the cracks have healed
I've learned to love I've learned to feel

We're not broken anymore
We're dancing through the open door
Every scar's a song we sing
Every wound gave us these wings
Not broken not broken

Two souls stronger after storms
A fire reforged our battered forms
I thought love meant silence
A word I couldn't say
But now I know it lights the way

We're not broken anymore
Hear the chorus hear the roar
Every scar's a song we sing
Every wound gave us these wings
Not broken not broken not broken anymore

The shame is gone the lies erased
We hold our truth we've found our place
The past was chains the past was pain
But love has freed us once again

We're not broken anymore
The spotlight's ours once more
Every scar's a song we sing
Every wound gave us these wings
Not broken not broken not broken anymore

Not broken not broken anymore
